qids.prose: Consider the following scheme for implementing a critical section in a situation with three processes and . Pi; repeat flag[i] := true; while flag [j] or flag[k] do case turn of j: if flag [j] then begin flag [i] := false; while turn != i do skip; flag [i] := true;
